name: Codex PR Publication Watchdog
purpose: Detect Codex-dispatched GitHub issues where Codex acknowledged work but no GitHub PR was published, then mark the issue blocked and notify Slack once.
eligibility: Open GitHub issue has labels plane, codex-ready, automation, and codex-in-progress.
Issue does not have labels codex-pr-open, done, or blocked.
Issue has not been updated for CONFIG.stale_minutes.
core_logic: Search for one oldest stale Codex-in-progress issue per run to avoid Slack floods.
Search open pull requests for the Plane issue metadata.
If an open PR exists, label the source issue codex-pr-open.
If no open PR exists, comment on the issue, apply codex-pr-missing and blocked labels, and notify Slack.
Blocked labels exclude the issue from future watchdog runs.
safe_failure_handling: Do not send Slack on the happy path.
Send exactly one exception Slack message per blocked missing-PR incident.
Do not create or retry Codex requests automatically; humans should inspect the Codex task link and repair connector PR publication.
Do not include secrets or raw webhook payloads in GitHub comments or Slack messages.
